steps.title: Use the two legs
steps.content:
The right triangle has legs of length $1$ and $1$, and $z$ is the hypotenuse. Use the Pythagorean theorem:
$$z^2=1^2+1^2$$

steps.title: Find the hypotenuse
steps.content: Simplify and take the positive square root because $z$ is a length: $$z^2=2$$ $$z=\sqrt{2}$$ The answer is D.
